creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 220134
Add compatibility to (un)rar 6.x (fixed)


The previous patch caused the creation of a file named 'x4' in the folder you opened a RAR file in. Not sure why that happens, since according to 'man test' you should be able to use [ str1 > str2 ].

Changed it so it uses integer comparison, which seems to work fine on my machine.
